channel.title: Global Affairs Daily
channel.description: In-depth analysis of international relations and geopolitics

item.title: NATO Summit Addresses Eastern European Security Concerns
item.description: Alliance members discuss expanded defense commitments and new membership applications amid ongoing regional tensions.

item.title: South China Sea Tensions Rise Over Disputed Territory
item.description: Multiple nations assert overlapping claims as naval patrols increase in contested waters.

item.title: Climate Accord Implementation Faces New Hurdles
item.description: Developing nations push for increased financial commitments from industrialized countries as deadlines approach.

item.title: Middle East Peace Negotiations Enter Critical Phase
item.description: Regional mediators report progress on key sticking points after months of shuttle diplomacy.

item.title: African Union Proposes Continental Free Trade Expansion
item.description: New proposal would reduce tariffs across 30 additional product categories and harmonize customs procedures.
